expectations.text: config/install/site_announcements.settings.yml exists with default values including langcode
expectations.evidence: config/install/site_announcements.settings.yml exists with correct defaults (announcement_text: 'Welcome', display_enabled: true, max_display_count: 3), but langcode key is missing. File has 3 lines, no langcode entry.
config/schema/site_announcements.schema.yml exists with type config_object, mapping for announcement_text (label), display_enabled (boolean), max_display_count (integer).

expectations.text: Schema types correctly use string, boolean, and integer (not all strings)
expectations.evidence: Schema uses 'label' for announcement_text, 'boolean' for display_enabled, 'integer' for max_display_count -- properly typed, not all strings.

expectations.text: Config YAML keys match what the form reads via $config->get()
expectations.evidence: Install YAML has keys announcement_text, display_enabled, max_display_count. Form reads $config->get('announcement_text'), $config->get('display_enabled'), $config->get('max_display_count') -- all match.

expectations.text: Form extends ConfigFormBase (not FormBase) and implements getEditableConfigNames()
expectations.evidence: AnnouncementsSettingsForm.php line 11: 'extends ConfigFormBase', line 23: 'protected function getEditableConfigNames(): array' returns ['site_announcements.settings'].

expectations.text: Does NOT use variable_get/variable_set or State API for persistent settings
expectations.evidence: No occurrences of variable_get, variable_set, \Drupal::state(), or State:: in any output file. Uses config system exclusively via $this->configFactory->getEditable().

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en site_announcements returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list showing site_announcements in enabled modules.

expectations.text: Config loads correctly: ddev drush config:get site_announcements.settings returns values without error
expectations.evidence: ddev drush config:get site_announcements.settings returns: announcement_text: Welcome, display_enabled: true, max_display_count: 3.

expectations.text: Config change reflects on page: after config:set announcement_text 'Test123', form shows 'Test123'
expectations.evidence: E2E verified: after ddev drush config:set, navigated to /admin/config/system/announcements as admin. Snapshot shows textbox 'Announcement text' with value 'Test123'.
